description: MECE Framework for Food & Beverage (F&B) Industry.

classes.definition: 提供实体餐饮及接待服务的终端营业场所。
classes.definition_en: A terminal physical establishment providing food, beverages, and hospitality services.

classes.definition: 集中进行食材初步加工或半成品制作的枢纽节点。
classes.definition_en: A centralized hub for preliminary processing of ingredients or semi-finished products.

classes.definition: 餐饮物料及冷链分发的区域仓储中心。
classes.definition_en: Regional storage center for the dispatch of catering materials and cold chain.

classes.definition: 前厅即供顾客用餐及休憩的划分空间。
classes.definition_en: Front-of-house area demarcated for customer dining and rest.

classes.definition: 后场专门进行备餐及烹饪的受控区域。
classes.definition_en: Back-of-house controlled area dedicated to food preparation and cooking.

classes.definition: 向终端顾客售卖的独立餐饮单品 SKU。
classes.definition_en: Standalone consumable food SKU sold to end customers.

classes.definition: 多个菜单单品组合绑定的销售单元。
classes.definition_en: A composite sales unit binding multiple menu items together.

classes.definition: 随餐具送出、用于包装防溢或承载的外带消耗品。
classes.definition_en: Consumable takeaway packing applied for containment and spill prevention.

classes.definition: 出资并获权实际承接品牌分店运营体系的外部组织。
classes.definition_en: External organizations investing in and authorized to run the brand branch.

classes.definition: 供应生鲜、半成品或包装材料的外部机构。
classes.definition_en: External institution supplying fresh, semi-finished, or packaging materials.

classes.definition: 对单一门店各项人货流KPI全权负责的运营骨干。
classes.definition_en: Operational leader fully accountable for an individual store's KPIs.

classes.definition: 执行餐饮核心制作 SOP 的后厨人员。
classes.definition_en: Kitchen personnel executing core culinary SOPs.

classes.definition: 承接外带订单将其物流送达C端的派送人员。
classes.definition_en: Dispatch personnel delivering ordered food to the end consumer.

classes.definition: 从预热出库到组装打包餐品的关键生产活动。
classes.definition_en: Core production activity spanning from prep to assembly and packaging.

classes.definition: 单一顾客消费行为所产生的履约合约与流水。
classes.definition_en: The fulfillment contract and transaction generated by a patron's consumption.

classes.definition: 确保全链条合规性、控制过期或卫生风险的安全审计。
classes.definition_en: Safety audits ensuring full-chain compliance and mitigating hygiene risks.

classes.definition: 供制餐消耗的原始食物级物料。
classes.definition_en: Raw food-grade material to be consumed in preparation.

classes.definition: 用于餐饮粗细加工的电器或高值固定资产。
classes.definition_en: Appliances or high-value fixed assets used in culinary prep.

classes.definition: 指导厨房如何搭配定量食材与加工标准的图文数字资产。
classes.definition_en: Digital/text asset standardizing quantitative ingredient mixes and processing.

relations.definition: 特许经营商出资并主理指定门店
供应商向品牌输送食品原料
门店由一位具体的店长全权管理
实体套餐绑定特定的单品组合
单项成品售卖前需要消耗设定的原料
制餐过程必须遵循SOP配方的要求与规程
外带/外卖订单需要使用配给的包材
